economic_notes: Montreal Lake Business Ventures Limited Partnership (99.99% owned) generated net earnings of $1,046,559 in 2022. La Ronge Wild Rice Corporation held as portfolio investment at 5.3%. Woodland Cree Enterprises Incorporated accounted for as government partnership using proportionate consolidation. COVID-19 additional funding received from ISC in current year.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Audited and signed March 9, 2023 — significant delay. Consolidated entities include Montreal Lake Reserve, Little Red River Reserve, William Charles Health Centre, Paskwawaskihk Health Centre, Montreal Lake CMHC Housing Program, Little Red Community Store, and MLCN Urban Services Inc. Montreal Lake Business Ventures Limited Partnership and Montreal Lake Business Ventures Limited accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs). Woodland Cree Enterprises Incorporated proportionately consolidated as government partnership. First Nations Bank loan covenant violation noted — lender had not demanded repayment as of report date. Restricted cash includes $12,060,903 in capital project accounts and $845,460 in CMHC housing reserves plus $2,948,450 term deposit. expenses_education includes both Post Secondary ($2,631,904) and Education ($7,372,439) segments totalling $10,004,343. No remuneration schedule found in extracted text.
